title: SA-H2 Fund Makes Inaugural Investment in Hive Hydrogen, South AfricaГўв‚¬в„ўs First Large-Scale Green Ammonia Plant
content: SA-H2 Fund (Гўв‚¬Е“SA-H2Гўв‚¬Вќ also known as Гўв‚¬Е“CI3 South AfricaГўв‚¬Вќ), managed by a partnership between leading climate finance investor Climate Fund Managers (Гўв‚¬Е“CFMГўв‚¬Вќ) and Dutch development financing institution, Invest International, has committed up to USD 20mn in development funding to complete the final stage of development of the Hive Hydrogen Coega Green Ammonia Project Гўв‚¬вЂњ South AfricaГўв‚¬в„ўs first large-scale green ammonia production facility.
author: Analysts Account
